arcs.title: Passable (Conditional)
arcs.summary: Day 2: The chart's conditional quadrant was surveyed in different ink, suggesting a later addition or a separate cartographer. Steve has traced the same contour line three times without comment. Christine slowed on her third pass. Both brass ducks face southwest. The Jeep is at a new angle. Steve's working theory exists but has not been disclosed. Day 3 should bring the theory into the open — either Steve names the condition, or Christine identifies it first by reading the ink difference against the Hempworth November margins. The question of what specifically makes the terrain conditional (seasonal drainage? A structural feature? Something the chart is declining to commit to?) should begin to resolve.
